title: Network Monitoring Dashboard System
description: A NOC-focused network monitoring dashboard using AI to analyze node availability, link risk, and live alerts.
description_cn: 面向 NOC 的网络监控看板，结合 AI 分析节点在线率、链路风险和实时告警。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Network Monitoring Dashboard System: a NOC dashboard, node status, link utilization, real-time alerts, and an AI health report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/36-network-monitoring.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 网络监控看板：NOC 看板、节点状态、链路利用率、实时告警和 AI 健康报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/36-network-monitoring.html
